Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation until the next activity (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed followed by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in the variant leading to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer No Response to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to the time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation versus SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where multiple reviewer invitations (including SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Reviewer Declined) occurred beforehand
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Cycle time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in review processes that originated from a major revision (e.g., after RW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'RW-EIC Major Revision' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in traces containing at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed event
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between the last SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in complex variants with repeated reviewer assignments
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that conclude with an acceptance decision (e.g., RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants involving editor reassignment (e.g., Assign a Different Editor)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation when preceded by three or more SW-Reviewer Agreed events versus only one SW-Reviewer Agreed event
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
